entries.name: Abomination
entries.abilitiesText:
*Ravenous.* When you play a card, you may discard a card to take twice as many actions with your played card.
*Revealed.* When a suit is led, reveal all your matching cards.

entries.name: Alchemist
entries.abilitiesText:
*Transformative.* When you **declare** **an** **ambition**, discard 1 resource to gain 2 resources of different types other than the one you discarded.
*Cautious.* You cannot spend your last resource.

entries.name: Ambassador
entries.abilitiesText:
*Diplomatic.* When you **declare** **an** **ambition**, you may **secure** any number of times.
*Unauthorized.* You cannot **secure** unless an ambition has been declared.

entries.name: Ancient Wraith
entries.abilitiesText:
*The* *Undying* *Reach.* Place the Twisted Passage rules card in play. Players may move out of the Passage, and no players may harm Rivals there.
*Ethereal.* You cannot build shipyards, but your destroyed ships are never taken as trophies and are instead placed on the Twisted Passage.

entries.name: Architect
entries.abilitiesText:
*Visionary.* You can **build** at loyal cities and **tax** loyal starports.
*Meticulous.* You cannot **move** if you would lose control of a building.

entries.name: Artificer
entries.abilitiesText:
*Proficient.* After you Copy or Pivot to **build** or **repair**, you may build or repair.
*Diligent.* You cannot Pivot if the lead suit is Construction or Administration.

entries.name: Assasin
entries.abilitiesText:
*Lethal.* After you **influence**, if you have the most agents on a card, you destroy one Rival agent on it.
*Bloodthirsty.* If a Rival has as many or more agents on a card than you, you can only **influence** those cards.

entries.name: Augur
entries.abilitiesText:
*Baneful.* When you **secure** a card, you may bury it to secure the top card of the deck instead.
*Accursed.* After you **secure** a card, discard all your matching resources.

entries.name: Automaton
entries.abilitiesText:
*Overclocked.* If you spend 2 or more resources, you may **influence** at the end of your Prelude.
*Wasteful.* After you **secure** a card using 2 or more agents, scrap an agent.

entries.name: Bargainer
entries.abilitiesText:
*Leveraged.* You may return a player’s trophy or captive to **tax** one of their cities.
*Obliged.* To gain Power from an ambition, you must return a trophy or captive, if you don't, gain no Power.

entries.name: Beacon
entries.abilitiesText:
*Guiding.* When you **move** into a gate, you may place a beacon there. Beacons allow any player to Catapult **move** through that gate.
*Radiant.* Before scoring, you may discard a beacon to gain 2 resources.

entries.name: Beggar
entries.abilitiesText:
*Frugal.* If you start your **Prelude** with no resources and no Guild cards, gain **any** resource.
*Communal.* If you start your turn with any resources, discard a resource or card.

entries.name: Bomber
entries.abilitiesText:
*Incendiary.* When attacking in **battle**, before collecting dice, you may destroy 1 attacking ship to destroy 2 defending pieces.
*Infamous.* When you destroy a starport, also **Provoke** **Outrage** of that starport's planet type.

entries.name: Broker
entries.abilitiesText:
*Mercantile.* When you **influence** a card, you may place 1 of your resources on it to influence it again. When it is **secured**, gain those resources.
*Indebted.* When you **declare** **an** **ambition**, return a piece or give a resource to a Rival.

entries.name: Cartographer
entries.abilitiesText:
*Exploratory.* After you initiate a Catapult **move**, gain a Fuel.
*Distracted.* When you Catapult **move**, after each move you must drop off 1 ship.

entries.name: Chief
entries.abilitiesText:
*Imposing.* After any Rival of whom you control a building **taxes** or **builds**, you may **tax** or **build** respectively.
*Bountiful.* Before **scoring**, give 1 resource to each player of whom you control a building.

entries.name: Chosen
entries.abilitiesText:
*Hallowed.* After you move a single ship, you may **battle**. In **battle**, the die it rolls has its result count thrice.
*Forsaken.* If you have not attacked this chapter, you cannot **declare** **an** **ambition**.

entries.name: Collector
entries.abilitiesText:
*Acquisitive.* When you **secure** a card, gain a resource matching its type.
*Jaded.* After **scoring**, discard a Guild card, if you can't, discard all resources you have.

entries.name: Companion
entries.abilitiesText:
*Helpful.* When a Rival **battles**, you may allow them to use your ships like they are Loyal. If they do, take 1 of their agents as a favor. You may spend this favor to use their ships like they are Loyal in a **battle** on your turn.
*Entangled.* **At** **the** **start** **of** **each** **chapter**, give 1 favor to a player.

entries.name: Composer
entries.abilitiesText:
*Elegant.* When you spend a pip to **repair**, gain 1 resource.
*Obsessed.* You cannot **build** or **tax** in clusters where any of your pieces are damaged.

entries.name: Conduit
entries.abilitiesText:
*Conductive.* Once per turn, you may spend a resource as a resource no player has **Provoked** **Outrage** in.
*Overloaded.* In **setup**, Provoke Weapon Outrage.

entries.name: Courier
entries.abilitiesText:
*Swift.* **At** **the** **start** **of** **each** **chapter**, place 3 agents on planets with no Loyal pieces. When you **move** into one, return the agent and gain a resource matching that planet. (The agent cannot be battled or used to build at.)
*Careless.* You **cannot** gain bonus city Power if you have not returned all agents on the board.

entries.name: Creator
entries.abilitiesText:
*Ingenious.* When you **build** a ship, you may take it from any Rival's supply and build it at any starport. If you build a Rival's ship, take a resource matching that system.
*Onerous.* idk

entries.name: Crusader
entries.abilitiesText:
*Zealous.* When you destroy a building, **secure** a matching card from the Court.
*Dogmatic.* You cannot **influence** a card with no agents if a Rival can secure a card with any of your Loyal agents..

entries.name: Curator
entries.abilitiesText:
*Meticulous.* When you **secure** a card, you may discard it to gain two lore cards.
*Ascetic.* After **scoring**, give one lore card to another player. If you're in first place, give away another.

entries.name: Custodian
entries.abilitiesText:
*Vigilant.* When a Rival ships **move** into a gate you control, gain 1 resource matching any city in that gate's cluster.
*Heedless.* Damaged Rival ships may move again after moving into a gate you control.

entries.name: Despot
entries.abilitiesText:
*Autocratic.* When you **declare** **an** **ambition**, you may **tax** one city you control of each player.
*Merciless.* After **scoring**, destroy one Loyal ship in each system with a city.

entries.name: Diplomat
entries.abilitiesText:
*Canny.* Before **scoring** **ambitions**, you **secure** all cards where you have the most agents.
*Greedy.* In **setup**, place an agent on your Relic Outrage slot.

entries.name: Djinn
entries.abilitiesText:
*Wishful.* At the start of your Prelude, name a resource type. Until the end of your turn, you may spend resources only as that type.
*Bound.* When you have a resource type outraged, you **cannot** spend it.

entries.name: Dreamer
entries.abilitiesText:
*Lucid.* When you **declare** **an** **ambition**, gain 1 lore card.
*Blurred.* Your lore cards have a raid cost of 2 keys.

entries.name: Duelist
entries.abilitiesText:
*Daring.* In **battle**, if you attack with exactly 1 ship, collect 3 extra dice.
*Honor-bound.* In **battle**, if you attack a smaller fleet, you cannot roll assault dice.

entries.name: Egoist
entries.abilitiesText:
*Willful.* When you Pivot, you may take any action except those on your played card.
*Inflexible.* You can only Copy with cards of the lead suit.

entries.name: Emperor
entries.abilitiesText:
*Imperial.* In **scoring**, your city bonus is 2 Power per city you control.
*Exacting.* In **scoring**, you don't gain Power for second place unless you tied for first.

entries.name: Enforcer
entries.abilitiesText:
*Mandating.* When you **declare** **an** **ambition**, take an action on your played card twice.
*Unpopular.* You cannot **influence** if no ambitions have been declared.

entries.name: Engineer
entries.abilitiesText:
*Versatile.* Your starports can **move**, **battle**, intercept and control like a ship. You place starports outside building slots.
*Exorbitant.* You can only **build** starports at cities, once per city, per turn.
*Fragile.* After you Catapult **move**, damage the starport you used.

entries.name: Extortioner
entries.abilitiesText:
*Shrewd.* When you Copy or Pivot to **tax**, you may tax the city of the player who led.
*Vindictive.* In **scoring**, if Tyrant is declared and you don't win it, scrap 3 agents.

entries.name: Feral
entries.abilitiesText:
*Savage.* In **battle** in a system with no buildings, collect 2 extra dice.
*Uncivilized.* When you **secure** (not ransack) a card with any Rival agents on it, destroy a building you control.

entries.name: Fiend
entries.abilitiesText:
*Gluttonous.* When you **Provoke** **Outrage**, if you already have it outraged, clear it instead and gain that resource thrice.
*Wrathful.* In **setup**, **Provoke** **Outrage** in all resource types except 1, then gain any 2 resources.

entries.name: Firebrand
entries.abilitiesText:
*Partisan* *Seizing.* Place the Partisan Seizing rules card near the action area. This game, players can seize by provoking outrage if they do not wish to spend a second action card.
*Shameless.* Whenever you win **any** ambition, you may discard a resource to remove the matching outrage.

entries.name: Forager
entries.abilitiesText:
*Rooting.* When you **move** into a planet with no pieces, gain 1 matching resource.
*Territorial.* When you **move** out of a planet, if it would be left empty, **build** a building there.

entries.name: Gambler
entries.abilitiesText:
*Cunning.* You may **pass** the initiative to any player, then guess a suit. If they have it, they must play it, and your card let's you take twice as many actions.
*Compulsive.* You must **pass** the initiative the first time you have it each chapter.

entries.name: General
entries.abilitiesText:
*Blitzing.* In **battle**, you may discard a resource to ignore all intercepts.
*Insurmountable.* In **battle**, if you have more fresh ships, collect 1 extra die.
*Reckless.* In **battle**, you must always roll at least 1 die of each type if you can.

entries.name: Ghost
entries.abilitiesText:
*Manifested.* Once per turn, when you Catapult **move**, your ships may move through one Rival controlled gate. If you do, you may influence.
*Directionless.* You can use at most one **move** action each turn.

entries.name: God's Hand
entries.abilitiesText:
*Faithful* *Reach.* Before dealing action cards, mix in the 6 Faithful Action cards (FL1-6) and take Champion of the Faith title (F7).
*An* *Era* *of* *Heresy.* When any player wins Empath, they take Champion of the Faith title.

entries.name: Golem
entries.abilitiesText:
*Ironclad.* After **any** **battle**, you may discard a resource to keep all your Loyal destroyed ships from that battle damaged instead.
*Cold.* In **clean** **up**, destroy **all** your damaged ships.

entries.name: Hierarch
entries.abilitiesText:
*Entitled.* At the end of your turn, **influence** a card where you are tied with another player.
*Rigid.* You cannot **influence** on a turn in which you Pivot.

entries.name: Highroller
entries.abilitiesText:
*Audacious.* After you roll dice in **battle**, you may damage 1 of your attacking ships to reroll **all** dice.
*Feverish.* After you reroll dice in **battle**, **Provoke** **Outrage** in any resource.

entries.name: Iconoclast
entries.abilitiesText:
*Radical.* After you play an extra action card, you may destroy a city you control to steal a Guild card which matches that city's type.
*Fervent.* In **setup**, destroy one of your cities.

entries.name: Imperator
entries.abilitiesText:
*Empire* *Builder.* When you win an ambition score twice as many points from your city bonus.
*Sneering.* You do not score second place for any ambition.

entries.name: Insurgent
entries.abilitiesText:
*Seditious.* After attacking in **battle**, you may **influence** a card with a defender's agent on it.
*Decentralized.* You cannot **repair** ships.

entries.name: Kaiju
entries.abilitiesText:
*Devouring.* When you destroy a city, repair all your ships in its cluster.
*Feared.* When you **tax** a city you control, damage it.

entries.name: Magician
entries.abilitiesText:
*Elusive.* After you **tax** a city, you may place it in any building slot you control or swap it with any Loyal building.
*Unmasked.* When you **tax** a Rival city, you only gain a resource or captive, not both.

entries.name: Manipulator
entries.abilitiesText:
*Clever.* When you **declare** **an** **undeclared** **ambition**, you may move any agents on cards to other cards.
*Fraudulent.* When you **secure** a card with Rival agents on it, capture/take only 1 and place the rest on other cards.

entries.name: Martyr
entries.abilitiesText:
*Venerated.* After defending in a **battle**, if the attacker took any trophies, gain a resource matching the battle's system, gain **any** if in gate.
*Selfless.* In **any** **battle** in a system with your ships, any hits that would damage a city damage your fresh ships first instead.

entries.name: Maw
entries.abilitiesText:
*Voracious.* When you **declare** **an** **ambition**, place a ship in any system.
*Crushing.* When any Rival moves ships into a planet you control, you may destroy 1.
*Starving.* In **scoring**, if Warlord is declared and you don't win it, scrap 2 Loyal ships.

entries.name: Mediator
entries.abilitiesText:
*Conciliatory.* When you **secure** a Guild card, you may discard it to clear its type's **Outrage** and gain a matching resource.
*Punitive.* If you **Provoke** **Outrage** in a type you already have outraged, **Provoke** **Outrage** in a type you don't have outraged.

entries.name: Messiah
entries.abilitiesText:
*Redemptive.* When you **build** a city in a system with any damaged Rival ships, you may replace all those damaged Rival ships with Loyal fresh ships.
*Reckoning.* In **scoring**, if you win no ambitions, destroy all your damaged ships.

entries.name: Musician
entries.abilitiesText:
*Inspiring.* To seize the iniative, you may give two resources they don't have to the player with the initiative.
*Temperamental.* When you gain the initiative, damage 1 Loyal ship.

entries.name: Necromancer
entries.abilitiesText:
*Arising.* After **any** **battle**, for each piece you destroyed, you may place a matching fresh Loyal piece there.
*Gravebound.* In **setup**, damage both of your buildings. You cannot **build** fresh pieces, place them damaged instead.

entries.name: Nomad
entries.abilitiesText:
*Unadorned.* While you have the fewest resources, ignore the **tax** limit and city control.
*Appeasing.* When you **tax** a Rival city, they gain 1 resource of your choice.

entries.name: Ozymendias
entries.abilitiesText:
*Hubristic.* When you control all gates, **secure** the entire Court, returning all agents, then you destroy all loyal ships in the gates.
*Forgotten.* You cannot **influence** if you control no gate.

entries.name: Poet
entries.abilitiesText:
*Creative.* You can **Surpass** with cards of a different suit as long as its initiative is greater than the lead card. (On a tie with a suited card, they take initiative.)
*Pretentious.* You cannot **Surpass** with cards of the same suit as the lead card.

entries.name: Prefect
entries.abilitiesText:
*Judicious.* In **scoring**, if any players tie for first in an ambition, you gain the initiative.
*Immunized.* If you have the initiative you don't **Provoke** **Outrage**.
*Fair.* Before **scoring**, the Rival with the least Power may take a resource or 3 power from you.

entries.name: Prince
entries.abilitiesText:
*Royal. When you lead you may "knight" a Rival's ship, making it Loyal to you for the rest of the turn.
*Juvenile.* After **scoring**, lose 1 ship if you didn't declare an ambition.

entries.name: Prophet
entries.abilitiesText:
*Revelatory.* When you **declare** **an** **ambition**, you may **secure** any Guild card in the Court discard pile.
*Fatalistic.* You cannot seize the initiative.

entries.name: Puppeteer
entries.abilitiesText:
*Guiding.* Once per turn, when a Rival tries to **influence** a card with your agents on it, you may force them to influence any other card instead.
*Straining.* To **secure** a card with any Rival agents on it, you must have 2 more agents on it than them instead of 1.

entries.name: Sage
entries.abilitiesText:
*Arcane.* In **setup**, gain 5 extra Lore cards.
*Elusive.* Players may **influence** and **secure** your lore. When you **secure** your own lore, gain one lore card.

entries.name: Saint
entries.abilitiesText:
*Sacred.* When a Rival wins an ambition, they give you a resource. If they can't, they give you a Guild card.
*Blessed.* Before **scoring**, you may **declare** **an** **ambition**.
*Corrupted.* When you win an ambition, discard a resource. If you can't, discard a Guild card.

entries.name: Salvager
entries.abilitiesText:
*Opportunistic.* After **any** **battle** in a system adjacent to one of your ships, if any ship was destroyed in that battle, you may place 1 ship in that system.
*Grimy.* You can **build** at most 1 ship per turn.

entries.name: Samurai
entries.abilitiesText:
*Perfected.* In **battle**, you may change 1 of your dice to any face (like a reroll).
*Honorable.* After attacking in **battle**, return half the pieces you took as trophies (rounded down).

entries.name: Scavenger
entries.abilitiesText:
**Scavenge** **(Tax):** Damage a fresh rival ship in a system you control. Then gain a resource matching that system.
*Broken* *Reach.* In **setup**, all players Provoke Material Outrage.

entries.name: Scourge
entries.abilitiesText:
Pyromaniacal. When attacking in **battle**, at the start, you may return any number of trophies matching the defender; deal 1 hit for each.
*Insatiable.* Before **scoring**, if you have no cities as trophies, destroy a Loyal city.

entries.name: Seeker
entries.abilitiesText:
*Inquisitive.* When you **tax**, gain the resource twice if the matching ambition is declared (Weapon matches Warlord).
*Distracted.* After **scoring**, discard one resource matching a declared ambition.

entries.name: Seer
entries.abilitiesText:
*Prescient.* After you discard a Guild card, you may take an action on the **Lead** **card**.
*Narrow-minded.* You **cannot** take more than 2 different types of standard actions each turn.

entries.name: Sentient
entries.abilitiesText:
*Formless.* **At** **the** **start** **of** **each** **chapter**, choose a gate. Until the end of the chapter, you may Catapult and **build** ships there any number of times per turn.
*Shapeless.* In **setup**, scrap all your starports.

entries.name: Sentinel
entries.abilitiesText:
*Assertive.* At the start of **any** **battle**, if you control the gate of the cluster the battle is in, deal 1 hit.
*Cautious.* You cannot roll more raid and assault dice than you have fresh attacking ships.

entries.name: Shaman
entries.abilitiesText:
*Holostic.* When you **declare** **an** **ambition**, you may **repair** damaged ships you don't control.
*Disruptive.* You cannot **repair** ships you control.

entries.name: Shapeshifter
entries.abilitiesText:
*Mimicry.* When any player **declares** **an** **ambition**, gain a resource of its type. (Weapon for Warlord, you choose Material or Fuel for Tycoon.)
*Flickering.* After **scoring**, discard all your resources, then gain 1 Material.

entries.name: Siegebreaker
entries.abilitiesText:
*Ruinous.* In **battle**, if the defender has any buildings in the system, you may collect 1 extra assault die.
*Brutal.* When you destroy a building in **battle**, destroy 1 of your ships in that system.

entries.name: Smuggler
entries.abilitiesText:
*Opportunistic.* In **battle**, if you rolled any keys, you may steal 1 resource for free.
*Hunted.* After you destroy a building in **battle**, the defender may move all your attacking ships into a gate.

entries.name: Solian
entries.abilitiesText:
*Settled.* **Prelude:** You may move freely from planets (no free Catapult moves).
*Grounded.* When your ships **move** into an Rival-controlled gate, one of them takes a hit.

entries.name: Terraformer
entries.abilitiesText:
*Genesiacal.* **At** **the** **start** **of** **each** **chapter**, you may place a resource from the fullest supply on a planet with any loyal pieces to change its type. Also do this to a planet after you destroy a city on it.
*Codependent.* When you **tax**, you only gain resources from altered planets.

entries.name: Terrestrial
entries.abilitiesText:
*Symbiotic.* You may **build** in adjacent systems with no Rival pieces.
*Fertile.* Gain 1 Material when you **build** a starport; gain 1 matching resource when you **build** a city.
*Sprouting.* **At** **the** **start** **of** **each** **chapter**, you may replace a Loyal building with a ship.
*Rooted.* You cannot **battle** in clusters where you have no buildings.

entries.name: Titan
entries.abilitiesText:
*Immovable.* When defending in **battle**, your ships cannot be destroyed unless the attacker controls the gate of the battle system's cluster.
*Stationary.* Your damaged ships cannot Catapult **move**.

entries.name: Trickster
entries.abilitiesText:
*Misdirecting.* Before you play an action card, you may swap a played facedown action card with one of yours without looking at it first. Place yours face-up.
*Revealed.* When you  Copy or play an extra card to seize, place it face-up.

entries.name: Viceroy
entries.abilitiesText:
*Delegated.* When any player **builds** a city, you may place 1 of your ships in that city's cluster.
*Administrative.* In **setup**, scrap 4 starports.

entries.name: Warmonger
entries.abilitiesText:
*Bloodsoaked.* When you Copy or Pivot to **battle**, you may declare Warlord, if you do, each die you roll has its result count twice.
*Hellbent.* In **scoring**, if you win no ambitions, lose 5 Power.

entries.name: Weaver
entries.abilitiesText:
*Interwoven.* When you use a pip to **secure**, you may influence an adjacent card.
*Tangled.* You must discard a resource to **influence** a card with only Rival agents on it.

entries.name: Wheeler-dealer
entries.abilitiesText:
*Devious.* When you **declare** **an** **ambition**, you may **Provoke** **Outrage** in a non-Outraged type to **clear** **Outrage** in a different type. Then, spend 1 resource from the cleared type’s supply.

*Irate.* In **setup**, Provoke Relic or Psionic Outrage.

entries.name: Witch
entries.abilitiesText:
*Malefic.* When you **secure**, you may capture a Rival agent on another card.
*Covenbound.* You cannot **secure** unless there is an agent on another card.
